response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, notable open-source contributions, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at Stripe
Proven ability to lead technical projects and contribute to open-source tools
Strong full-stack proficiency across TypeScript, cloud platforms, and distributed systems
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
Lack of demonstrated customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise AI delivery
Education shows only a BS; no advanced degree or formal AI/ML specialization
